title: OP Carrots
description: Harvesting full stalk Carrots drop OP Loot!
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to another of my OP datapacks! In this pack, harvesting fully Ripe Carrots gives OP Loot! If the Carrots aren't ready, you only get 1 Carrot...

Leave the Pack Zipped In Your Datapack Folder! No Need To Type: /reload as this pack will auto load on it's own!
